# mypaintr

mypaintr is an R package that lets you plot graphics in a human-like,
sketched way, using brushes from the
[libmypaint](https://github.com/mypaint/libmypaint) library and
algorithms for “rough” lines and polygons.

## Installation

You can install the development version of mypaintr from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("hughjonesd/mypaintr")
```

## Example

A base R barplot using a custom brush, plus a hand-drawn axis:

``` r
library(mypaintr)

set_brush("experimental/bubble")
barplot(VADeaths, axes = FALSE, 
        beside = TRUE, col = palette.colors(5), border = NA,
        cex.names = 0.8)

set_brush(NULL)
set_hand(hand())
axis(side = 2, at = seq(0, 60, 20))
```

![](README_files/figure-gfm/unnamed-chunk-2-1.png)

# Package index

## Devices and Styles

- [`mypaint_device()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/mypaint_device.md)
  : Open a libmypaint-backed graphics device
- [`mypaint_style()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/mypaint_style.md)
  : Update the active mypaintr device style
- [`set_brush()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/set_brush.md)
  : Set the active mypaintr brush
- [`set_hand()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/set_hand.md)
  : Set the active mypaintr hand-drawn geometry
- [`brush_dirs()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/brush_dirs.md)
  : Discover installed mypaint brush directories
- [`brushes()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/brushes.md)
  : List installed mypaint brushes
- [`load_brush()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/load_brush.md)
  : Load an installed mypaint brush
- [`brush_presets()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/brush_presets.md)
  : Built-in brush presets
- [`brush_settings()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/brush_settings.md)
  : libmypaint brush setting metadata
- [`brush_inputs()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/brush_inputs.md)
  : libmypaint brush input metadata

## Rough Drawing

- [`hand()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/hand.md) :
  Hand-drawn geometry settings
- [`draw_rough_lines()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_lines.md)
  : Draw rough connected lines
- [`draw_rough_segments()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_segments.md)
  : Draw rough segments
- [`draw_rough_arrows()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_arrows.md)
  : Draw rough arrows
- [`draw_rough_points()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_points.md)
  : Draw rough points
- [`draw_rough_polygons()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_polygons.md)
  : Draw rough polygons
- [`draw_rough_polypath()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_polypath.md)
  : Draw a rough multipath with optional holes
- [`draw_rough_rect()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/draw_rough_rect.md)
  : Draw a rough rectangle
- [`rough_polygon()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/rough_polygon.md)
  : Compute a rough polygon outline
- [`rough_polypath()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/rough_polypath.md)
  : Compute a rough multipath outline
- [`rough_rect()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/rough_rect.md)
  : Compute a rough rectangle outline
- [`rough_segments()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/rough_segments.md)
  : Compute rough segment geometry

## Fill Patterns

- [`hatch()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/hatch.md)
  : Hatch fill pattern
- [`crosshatch()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/crosshatch.md)
  : Cross-hatch fill pattern
- [`zigzag()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/zigzag.md)
  : Zigzag fill pattern
- [`jumble()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/jumble.md)
  : Jumble fill pattern

## ggplot2 Integration

- [`geom_mypaint_bar()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/geom_mypaint_bar.md)
  : Draw rough, brush-rendered bars in ggplot2
- [`geom_mypaint_col()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/geom_mypaint_col.md)
  : Draw rough, brush-rendered columns in ggplot2
- [`element_mypaint_line()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/element_mypaint_line.md)
  : Theme line element with scoped mypaint rendering
- [`element_mypaint_rect()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/element_mypaint_rect.md)
  : Theme rectangle element with scoped mypaint rendering

## knitr

- [`knitr_chunk_hook()`](https://hughjonesd.github.io/mypaintr/reference/knitr_chunk_hook.md)
  : Create a knitr chunk hook for live mypaint rendering
